pubmed_links: [Barnett et al. (2014) Cognitive, sensory, and psychosocial characteristics in patients with Bardet-Biedl syndrome](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/24194441/)
summary: WDPCP is the causal gene for Bardet-Biedl syndrome type 15 (BBS15), a ciliopathy associated with cognitive impairment; autism is reported as a notable comorbidity of Bardet-Biedl syndrome more broadly. (novel candidate)
